name: WritersProof for Blackboard
tagline: Verify student work is authentically human-authored at submission time
description: WritersProof for Blackboard gives educators cryptographic proof that student submissions were genuinely composed by the submitting student. Integrated via LTI 1.3, WritersProof captures tamper-evident behavioral evidence during the writing process without storing actual content — only SHA-256 hashes. When students write essays, reports, or exam responses in Blackboard, the integration silently records proof-of-process evidence that instructors can review alongside the submission. Unlike AI detection tools that guess, WritersProof provides positive proof of human authorship grounded in cryptographic evidence chains.
features: LTI 1.3 integration with Blackboard Learn Ultra and Original experiences
Per-assignment attestation status visible in the Gradebook
Student-facing attestation indicator showing evidence capture is active
Instructor dashboard with class-wide attestation coverage analytics
Evidence timeline showing writing session duration, pauses, and revision patterns
Institutional admin console for deployment across courses and terms
FERPA-compliant design storing only cryptographic hashes, never student content

requirements.platform: Blackboard Learn Ultra or Blackboard Learn 9.1 Q2 2019+
requirements.integration_type: LTI 1.3 Advantage (Deep Linking + Assignment and Grade Services)
requirements.browser: Chrome, Firefox, Edge, or Safari with WritersProof browser extension
